label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which book Dave ends up with at the end of the semester. There are several steps here, so I need to track each swap carefully. Let me start by listing out the initial books each person has. Initially: - Alice has Moby Dick. - Bob has Ulysses. - Claire has The Fellowship of the Ring. - Dave has Lolita. - Eve has Catch-22. Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Claire and Bob swap books. So after this swap: - Claire now has Ulysses (previously Bob's). - Bob now has The Fellowship of the Ring (previously Claire's). Alice still has Moby Dick, Dave still has Lolita, Eve still has Catch-22. Second swap: Claire and Dave swap books. After this swap: - Claire, who had Ulysses, now gives it to Dave. So Dave gets Ulysses. - Dave, who had Lolita, gives it to Claire. Now Claire has Lolita. So now: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Ulysses - Eve: Catch-22 Third swap: Dave and Alice swap books. Dave has Ulysses and Alice has Moby Dick. After swapping: - Dave gives Ulysses to Alice, so Alice now has Ulysses. - Alice gives Moby Dick to Dave, so Dave now has Moby Dick. Current status: - Alice: Ulysses - Bob:
